articles.title: Watch: Constitution Amendment Bill, part of delimitation package, defeated
articles.description: Major political and geopolitical developments lead today’s headlines. The Constitution Amendment Bill on women’s quota faces a setback in the Lok Sabha, while Sri Lanka’s Power and Energy Minister resigns amid controversy. Iran has reopened the Strait of Hormuz, easing concerns over global shipping, even as remarks by Tejasvi Surya on Telangana trigger a political storm. The Supreme Court also flags illegal sand mining in Madhya Pradesh. Stay tuned for the full breakdown.

articles.title: Watch: Constitution Amendment Bill, part of delimitation package, defeated
articles.description: Major political and geopolitical developments lead today’s headlines. The Constitution Amendment Bill on women’s quota faces a setback in the Lok Sabha, while Sri Lanka’s Power and Energy Minister resigns amid controversy. Iran has reopened the Strait of Hormuz, easing concerns over global shipping, even as remarks by Tejasvi Surya on Telangana trigger a political storm. The Supreme Court also flags illegal sand mining in Madhya Pradesh. Stay tuned for the full breakdown.

articles.title: Gigs turns your concert history into a personal live music archive
articles.description: New iPhone app Gigs uses AI to turn old tickets, screenshots, and emails into a personal concert archive with stats, memories, and more.

articles.title: What next for South African opposition firebrand Malema after his five-year prison sentence?
articles.description: The sentence raises huge questions marks over the political future of one of South Africa's most controversial politicians.

articles.title: Centre’s approach on delimitation, women’s quota Bills wrong: Farooq Abdullah
articles.description: He said the way delimitation was done in J&K has left people ‘even more worried’

articles.title: 8 killed after tempo traveller plunges into gorge in Tamil Nadu, PM Modi condoles
articles.description: The accident occurred while tourists from Kerala returning from Valparai met with an accident at a steep curve on the hilly road, according to ANI.

articles.title: Schemes offering cash incentive to women takes centre stage is Bengal poll campaign
articles.description: As the Bengal poll campaign has reached its peak, the contest is gathering pace between the Lakshmir Bhandar of the Trinamool Congress and the Matri Shakti Vandan Yojana of the Bharatiya Janata Party

articles.title: Quote of the Day: Catherine O'Hara on joy — ‘In life, there is nothing better than laughing’
articles.description: Late actor and comedy icon Catherine O’Hara’s words on laughter continue to resonate, offering a simple yet powerful reminder of how humour can act as relief, resilience and emotional balance in everyday life.

topStories.title: Schemes offering cash incentive to women takes centre stage is Bengal poll campaign
topStories.description: As the Bengal poll campaign has reached its peak, the contest is gathering pace between the Lakshmir Bhandar of the Trinamool Congress and the Matri Shakti Vandan Yojana of the Bharatiya Janata Party

topStories.title: ‘Insult to Nari Shakti’: Amit Shah fumes at opposition as women's reservation amendment fails in Lok Sabha
topStories.description: Amit Shah said Congress and allies blocked the passage of the essential constitutional amendment for the law granting 33% reservation for women in legislatures.

topStories.title: Trump's big claim after Iran opens Strait of Hormuz: 'Has agreed to never close it'
topStories.description: Hours after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial vessels, US President Donald Trump on Friday (local time) said that the Islamic Republic has agreed to never close it again.

topStories.title: Iran To Close Hormuz Again If US Naval Blockade Persists: Report
topStories.description: Trump, however, claimed that Iran has agreed to never close the Strait of Hormuz again. "It will no longer be used as a weapon against the world," he said.

topStories.title: "Enough Is Enough": Trump Says US Banned Israel From Bombing Lebanon
topStories.description: Trump also said any deal the United States reaches with Iran "is in no way subject to Lebanon" but the US will "deal with" the militant Hezbollah situation in an appropriate manner.

topStories.title: 'Thank You Pakistan': Trump Praises Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif After Hormuz Breakthrough
topStories.description: The remarks came after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz had reopened to commercial shipping. Iranian officials said vessels would once again be allowed to pass through the route.

topStories.title: Controversy as Lebanese banker Sehnaoui is praised for supporting Israel
topStories.description: Trump envoy Morgan Ortagus says Antoun Sehnaoui is a committed Zionist, even as Israel attacked Lebanon.

topStories.title: Can Pakistan secure Iran-US nuclear compromise, as Trump says deal ‘close’?
topStories.description: Pakistan's civilian and army leaders shuttle between key capitals as Trump says he may visit Islamabad to sign a deal.

topStories.title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
topStories.description: Some lawmakers are calling for widespread reforms following years of surveillance scandals and abuses across successive U.S. administrations. But even if the spy law known as Section 702 expires in April, the government's spy powers will not automatically lapse.

topStories.title: FAA to probe viral incident of pilots making animal noises on ATC frequency: 'Conversations must be related to….’
topStories.description: The FAA is investigating pilots who made animal noises on ATC frequency, emphasising that communication must focus on safe aircraft operation. The incident occurred at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, with pilots reprimanded for seemingly doing fun.

topStories.title: Trump warns naval blockade will continue despite Iran opening Hormuz Strait - 'Full force'
topStories.description: Hours after Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi on Friday announced that the Strait of Hormuz has been declared completely open, US President Donald Trump said the naval blockade will remain in place until the US-Iran transaction is 100 per cent completed.

topStories.title: ‘Had enough’: American woman quits Sweden after 8 years, cites work and visa challenges in viral post
topStories.description: An American entrepreneur has announced her decision to leave Sweden after nearly a decade, citing career challenges, immigration hurdles and growing concerns about how foreign professionals are treated.

dailyNews.title: The three clocks of the Iran war
dailyNews.description: Trump is racing against the midterms, Iran is betting on endurance, and Netanyahu needs a war with no end.

dailyNews.title: Oil Prices Fall Sharply After Iran Says Strait of Hormuz Is Open
dailyNews.description: But analysts said it was not clear how quickly the oil industry in the Persian Gulf would be able to get back to normal.

dailyNews.title: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, Detained by ICE in Alabama, Is Released
dailyNews.description: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, 85, who was arrested amid an inheritance dispute, has returned to France, its foreign affairs minister said. She came to America last year after reconnecting with and marrying a former G.I.

dailyNews.title: She Made Sure Her Baby Was Born an American. Then Federal Agents Separated Them.
dailyNews.description: Diana Acosta Verde, who came into the United States illegally when she was six months pregnant, had to leave her baby at a hospital while she returned to a detention center.

dailyNews.title: Rumeysa Ozturk, Tufts Student Held in Immigration Detention, Returns to Turkey
dailyNews.description: Rumeysa Ozturk, who was detained for weeks by the Trump administration after co-writing a pro-Palestinian opinion essay, has graduated and returned home.

dailyNews.title: The 27-Year-Old Diplomat Waging Trump’s Cultural War With Europe
dailyNews.description: Five years out of college, Samuel Samson has driven the Trump administration’s push to upend America’s postwar relationship with Europe.

dailyNews.title: Lutnick Says Canada Trade Deal Needs to Be Reworked Ahead of Talks
dailyNews.description: Howard Lutnick, President Trump’s commerce secretary, derided Canada’s trade strategy and said a North American deal needed to be reworked.

dailyNews.title: We Need Lena Dunham Now More Than Ever
dailyNews.description: The era of “Girls” is long gone. Its creator still has much to teach us.

dailyNews.title: In ‘Famesick,’ Lena Dunham Diagnoses Celebrity, Illness and Herself
dailyNews.description: This unusually unfiltered memoir takes us to the hospital, to therapy and to the sometimes hostile set of “Girls.”

dailyNews.title: Aging in a Brightly Lit, Big City: Jay McInerney, With a New Novel
dailyNews.description: In 1984, Jay McInerney was a famous, young, hedonistic novelist. Now 71, he is wistful as he wraps up his tetralogy about a couple whose city, and marriage, are tested by the pandemic.

dailyNews.title: House Votes to Extend Expiring FISA Surveillance Law for 10 Days
dailyNews.description: The Senate approved a stopgap measure that passed the House early Friday. Libertarian-leaning House Republicans had balked at a long-term extension.

dailyNews.title: Texas Democrat James Talarico Is Out-Raising His G.O.P. Opponents
dailyNews.description: James Talarico, the Democratic nominee, has been amassing campaign cash as Senator John Cornyn and Attorney General Ken Paxton still battle each other.

topStories.description: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.

dailyNews.title: Harris blames Trump for rising gas prices — after once saying they're the 'price to pay for democracy'
dailyNews.description: Kamala Harris blasts Trump over surging gas prices tied to the Iran war, but her 2022 remarks on fuel costs and democracy highlight a stark contrast.

dailyNews.title: Trump plan for Triumphal Arch moves step closer to reality
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Commission of Fine Arts reportedly offered preliminary approval to President Donald Trump's plan for a massive new monument in the nation's capital city.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz "completely open" amid Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
dailyNews.description: President Trump has welcomed Iran's announcement that, at least while the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holds, the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" to all ships.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Trump's latest Strait of Hormuz announcement
dailyNews.description: Iran and President Trump announced that the Strait of Hormuz will now be open, but questions remain about the flow of traffic in the key water passage. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz is open but U.S. blockade will continue
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on social media claims that the Strait of Hormuz will be "completely open." CBS News' Natalie Brand reports.

dailyNews.title: Controversial surveillance program extended by House but only until April 30
dailyNews.description: The House OK'd a short-term renewal of a controversial surveillance program used by U.S. spy agencies, after Republicans revolted and refused President Trump's push for a longer extension.

dailyNews.title: Latest news after Iran and Trump claim Strait of Hormuz is "completely open"
dailyNews.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and President Trump have declared that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open." CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Olivia Rinaldi report.

dailyNews.title: Iran announces the Strait of Hormuz is open
dailyNews.description: Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is completely open for commercial ships for the remainder of the ceasefire. President Donald Trump also confirmed the news. NBC News' Matt Bradley reports on what this could mean for the future as peace talks with Iran could continue.

dailyNews.title: Trump expected to nominate ousted FEMA chief to lead agency again
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is expected to nominate Cameron Hamilton to serve as administrator of the Federal Emergency Management Agency, nearly a year after he was removed as its acting head.

dailyNews.title: Judge halts construction on Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: Judge halts construction on Trump's White House ballroom

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Iran 'fully' opens the Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
